# model.stationary_distribution { #tslai.model.stationary_distribution }

```python
tslai.model.stationary_distribution(Q)
```

Stationary distribution ``π`` of a CTMC generator.

Solves ``π Q = 0`` subject to ``π >= 0`` and ``Σ π = 1`` as the normalised
left null vector via an augmented least-squares system.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**Q**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[array_like](`array_like`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``(K, K)`` CTMC generator.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``(K,)`` stationary distribution (non-negative, sums to 1).
